    ‘I just didn’t get it done’: Rory McIlroy reacts to latest Major agony as Cameron Smith steals in for Open glory at St Andrews
    

            
            
    Rory McIlroy admitted he was beaten by the better man after the “disappointment” of missing out on ending his Major drought by finishing third at The 150th Open Championship at St Andrews.

    Rory McIlroy comes up just short in bid to end Major drought as Cameron Smith claims Open title at St Andrews
    

            
            
    Rory McIlroy's bid to end his eight-year Major drought came up just short as he finished third at The Open Championship at St Andrews, with Australia's Cameron Smith triumphing at the Old Course.
